holdings.infoBox: NBDS is an equity ETF with a total of 32 individual holdings. The top holdings are Arm Holdings stock at 7.90%, Advanced Micro Devices at 7.58%, NVIDIA at 6.92%, Nova Ltd. at 6.50%, and Monolithic Power Systems at 4.55%.

overview.description: The Neuberger Disrupters ETF (NBDS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 1000 Growth index. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of global companies that are perceived to be positioned to benefit from disruptive innovations and trends. NBDS was launched on Apr 6, 2022 and is issued by Neuberger Berman.

data.title: Investors should own companies with strong cash-flow, says Neuberger Berman's Jason Tauber
data.text: Jason Tauber, Neuberger Berman, joins 'Closing Bell: Overtime' to offer his defensive growth playbook.

data.title: Growth stocks remain resilient in weakening economy, says Neuberger's Jason Tauber
data.text: Jason Tauber, Neuberger Berman large cap disciplined growth and the disruptors portfolio manager, joins 'Closing Bell: Overtime' to discus his bullish case for the growth trade.
